ARTHUR HUDSON APPEARED FOR ORIENTATION ON JAN-22-2004

PARENTS APPEARED FOR MEDIATION. FATHER HAD PROOF HE ATTENDED ORIENTATION, I.E. DV SCREENING FORM ON FILE,AND BLUE TICKET. MOTHER INSISTED SHE ATTENDED ORIENTATION THE PREVIOUS DAY, 1/26/04, AND FORGOT HER BLUE TICKET. BJ HERRAN TAUGHT THE ORIENTATION ON 1/26/04. EIGHT PEOPLE WERE PRESENT AND ALL SIGNED IN. MOTHER'S NAME IS NOT WRITTEN ON THE SIGN UP SHEET. WE HAVE NO COMPLETED DV SCREENING FORM ON FILE, AND SHE HAS NO BLUE TICKET. SHE LEFT CONTINUING TO INSIST SHE HAD BEEN PRESENT. NO MEDIATION OCCURRED TODAY AND MOTHER NEEDS TO ATTEND ORIENTATION.
